items.headline: Johnston focused on becoming a complete hitter

news_items.headline: Brewers' Priester to have thoracic outlet surgery
news_items.summary: Milwaukee Brewers right-hander Quinn Priester will undergo season-ending surgery for thoracic outlet syndrome and is expected to be sidelined for eight to 10 months.

news_items.headline: Phillies OF García set for season-ending surgery
news_items.summary: The Phillies announced Thursday that outfielder Adolis García will undergo latissimus dorsi repair surgery on Wednesday, ending his season.

news_items.headline: Ohtani battles blister, sore knee in rocky outing
news_items.summary: Pitching with a sore left knee and a blister on his right middle finger, Shohei Ohtani cruised through four innings before allowing four runs in a rocky fifth inning, but the Dodgers rallied to beat the Rays 5-4.

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB proposes amateur-entry overhaul
news_items.summary: MLB's proposed changes include cutting amateur signing bonuses by more than $150M, making high school players ineligible for the draft and instituting an international draft.

news_items.headline: Time's Up! MLB nixes clock for Home Run Derby
news_items.summary: Major League Baseball is eliminating the clock for next month's All-Star Home Run Derby at Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

news_items.headline: Pereira on injured list after crashing into fence
news_items.summary: Chicago White Sox center fielder Everson Pereira was placed on the seven-day injured list with a concussion after crashing into the fence at Yankee Stadium.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Perez hurt when resistance band hits face
news_items.summary: Tigers outfielder Wenceel Perez was injured in a freak accident when he was hit in the the face by a resistance band in the training room following Tuesday's game against the Astros.

news_items.headline: M's Rodríguez exits loss with hamstring spasm
news_items.summary: Mariners outfielder Julio Rodríguez left Wednesday night's loss to the Orioles after ending the sixth inning with a strikeout.

news_items.headline: Woo twirls 7 scoreless innings in bounceback outing vs. Orioles
Bo Bichette discusses decision to sign with Mets during free agency despite 'good talks' with Phillies
news_items.summary: With the Mets in Philadelphia this weekend to take on the Phillies for the first time this season, it serves as a reminder that one of New York’s biggest offseason additions, Bo Bichette, nearly signed with the Mets’ biggest division rival before ultimately choosing New York.

news_items.headline: Lindor (calf) to start rehab assignment Friday, could be activated soon
Fixing the Arizona Diamondbacks first-base failings
news_items.summary: The Diamondbacks have had a complete disaster of a season at first-base. The original plan seems to have been to have a platoon there of Pavin Smith and the veteran free-agent Carlos Santana. But injury means that the pair have combined to start just 10 of the 74 games played there. In addition, they have […]

news_items.headline: Trout headed to IL with hamstring injury (report)
Jays Beat Red Sox
news_items.summary: Blue Jays 4 Red Sox 3 This is going to be a short recap, we’ll talk more about this one tomorrow. But…. Trey Yesavage was terrific. It was too bad about the back-to-back home runs in the eighth, but he was amazing. I feel bad that he didn’t get the win. Over the first seven […]
